title: olearia phlogopappa subsp. salicina
intro: Olearia phlogopappa subsp. salicina is a subspecies of the Olearia phlogopappa plant, commonly known as Swamp Olearia or Bushy Daisy, a flowering shrub native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and flowers of Olearia phlogopappa subsp. salicina contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits like reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
